name: Astra Ignota
short_description: A relaxing, space-themed puzzle game where you fill a board using symmetrical figures, while uncovering a mysterious sci-fi story. All boards are hand-crafted for maximum enjoyment.
detailed_description:
Astra Ignota is a minimalist puzzle game set aboard a sentient spaceship adrift between stars.

You must grow symmetrical galaxies from their cores outward, fill the entire board, and solve 60 rewarding, handcrafted puzzles, all while uncovering a mysterious sci-fi story told through brief narrative episodes.

The original idea comes from the game Tentai Show (also known as Galaxy), by the Japanese puzzle magazine Nicoli, creators of the Sudoku.

The game features multiple grid types, simple gameplay, and multiple tools that get unlocked as the story progresses. And no time pressure. It's about patience, observation, and discovery.

After a year in Early Access gathering feedback and polishing the experience, Astra Ignota is now ready for its full release.

  • 60 pleasant, hand-crafted levels

  • Infinite randomly-generated puzzles

  • Difficulty ramps up from tutorials to devilish

  • A touch of background story, uncovered chapter by chapter

  • Beautiful illustrations

  • A soothing soundtrack

  • Accessible, no timers or reflexes required

  • Full localization in 7 languages

  • Steam achievements and cloud synchronization

  • Level editor included

  • Suitable for all ages

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Catalan, Ukrainian
